summary: Plan-only PR inventory shard reviewed from the provided preflight artifact. Four PRs are independent remediation candidates, not a single canonical family. PR #87800 is routed to central security handling because its auth-provider/API-key/credentials/secrets-provider scope crosses the security-sensitive boundary for ProjectClownfish automation. No merge is recommended because the artifact does not include complete merge preflight proof, especially Codex /review results and hydrated human/review-bot comment resolution evidence. No fix artifact is emitted because none of the independent non-security PRs has a concrete narrow replacement path proven safer than the contributor branch from the available artifact.

actions.reason: Independent low-signal docs/i18n PR with failed behavior-proof gate and incomplete merge preflight; keep open for maintainer review rather than close or merge in this shard.
